nodes.title: Turn On/Off the amount of batches you need
Recomendation
widgets_values:
set any resolution from 480p to 720p for wan 2.2. Also u can resolution 1024x576

Also you can turn on and off batch group

Don't put SVI Loras on first batch

Please, before you generate long video - turn on a certain amount you need and if it need 

cfg1 in High noise gives faster result, but with cfg2 + negative prompt you'll get better result

Also click through UnetLoader, Clip, Vae and Lora loaders nodes to choose models in your path 

I have changed Power Lora Loader to Lora Manager nodes. Go to Lora Manager (L button near the manager) and choose lora on certain lora manager node. 
For new users with Lora Manager - begin to refresh lora path and then fetch to get lora's data from CivitAI

Please, choose High Noise Loras only for High Lora Loader and Low Noise Loras for Low Lora Models

Try writing prompt better and clearly. The better prompt the better result you get

in my opinion, 10-15 seconds videos is optimal choice for generation, but you can generate longer one

Good look with long video generation!

SageAttention.whl - https://github.com/woct0rdho/SageAttention/releases/tag/v2.2.0-windows. To install sageattention, u can .whl change to .zip and:
1. If u don't have sageattention, just put folders from .zip to ComfyUI\python_embeded\Lib\site-packages
2. If u have older version sageattention, delete folders with sageattention in ComfyUI\python_embeded\Lib\site-packages and put new folders from .zip

To install Triton (if u don't have Triton) go to ComfyUI\python_embeded and install by command [pip install triton] via cmd

if you got error BaseLoaderKJ._patch_modules.<locals>.attention_sage() got an unexpected keyword argument 'transformer_options', use run_nvidia_gpu - sageattention.bat instead run_nvidia_gpu.bat in ComfyUI from .zip archive
